problem id: fd13b7fd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR NOT SHL(6)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  01011010 -> 00001011
  00011101 -> 00000011
  01001010 -> 00001001
  10011111 -> 11010011
  10100110 -> 10010100
  10111001 -> 00010111
  11000101 -> 00011000
  10000100 -> 00010000
  11100100 -> 00011100

query: 11001101
predicted answer: 00011001
